title: tigridia matudae
intro: Tigridia matudae, also known as the Mexican shellflower or Mexican daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tigridia matudae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
